description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a Blue Jay, featuring a vibrant blue plumage on its back, wings, and tail, with a lighter grayish-white underside. The bird's head is adorned with a prominent blue crest, and its face displays a distinctive black line running from the beak, encircling the lower face and neck. The wings and tail exhibit intricate patterns of blue, black, and white, with the tail feathers showing a barred pattern and white tips. The beak is straight, medium-length, and black, suited for a variety of feeding behaviors. The legs and feet are slender and black, adapted for perching. Overall, the bird's form is sleek and streamlined, with detailed feather textures and naturalistic coloration.
description: A detailed Blue Jay with vivid blue, black, and white plumage, a crested head, and a straight black beak. The wings and tail feature intricate barred patterns, and the bird stands on slender black legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue crest, black facial markings, and grayish-white underside.
description_view_1: Left rear three-quarter view highlighting the blue back, patterned wings, and tail feathers.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the full length of the blue back and the barred blue-and-black tail with white tips.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the profile of the head, beak, and the detailed wing and tail feather patterns.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Barred and spotted blue, black, and white on wings and tail; solid blue back; grayish-white underside; black facial markings
